policy: fifo

jobs:
  1 arrival: 0 duration: 10
  2 arrival: 0 duration: 10
  3 arrival: 0 duration: 10

trace:
  0 run 1 for 10 cycles
  10 run 2 for 10 cycles
  20 run 3 for 10 cycles

stats:
  1  Response: 0   Turnaround: 10  Wait: 0  
  2  Response: 10  Turnaround: 20  Wait: 10 
  3  Response: 20  Turnaround: 30  Wait: 20 

average:
     Response: 10  Turnaround: 20  Wait: 10
